_comment: Canonical answers Claude can plug into custom screening questions. Edit freely.
work_authorization_us: Authorized to work in the US — no sponsorship required.
compensation_expectations: Open — looking for market for new-grad SWE at SF/NYC startups (base + equity). Happy to discuss specifics during the process.
willing_to_relocate: Yes — open to relocating to SF Bay Area or NYC.
remote_preference: Strong preference for in-person or hybrid; open to remote-US for the right team.
years_of_experience: Multiple SWE internships plus founder experience (CEO of Synari, $1K MRR); graduating May 2027.
graduation_date: May 2027 — B.S. Computer Science & Math, University of Maryland College Park
referral_source: Found this role through community-maintained new-grad lists on GitHub.
